mapper.sql: id, sign_id as signId, template_text as templateText, template_type as templateType, template_state as templateState, use_id as useId, use_web as useWeb, created, create_id as createId, updated, update_id as updateId, is_delete as isDelete, extend1, extend2, extend3, extend4

where is_delete = 0
and ( cast(id as char) like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or cast(sign_id as char) like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or template_text like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or use_web like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
mapper.select:
select
from client_template where is_delete = 0 order by sign_id asc, id asc

select
from client_template where id = #{id} and is_delete = 0

select id, template_text as templateText, template_type as templateType, template_state as templateState, use_id as useId, use_web as useWeb, created, create_id as createId, updated, update_id as updateId, is_delete as isDelete, extend1, extend2, extend3, extend4 from client_template where is_delete = 0 and sign_id = #{signId} order by id asc
mapper.insert: insert into client_template ( id, sign_id, template_text, template_type, template_state, use_id, use_web, create_id, update_id, is_delete, extend1, extend2, extend3, extend4 ) values ( #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{signId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{templateText,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{templateType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{templateState,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{useId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{useWeb,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{isDelete,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{extend1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{extend2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{extend3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{extend4,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.update:
update client_template
sign_id = #{signId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, template_text = #{templateText,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, template_type = #{templateType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, template_state = #{templateState,jdbcType=INTEGER}, use_id = #{useId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, use_web = #{useWeb,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_id = #{updateId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, extend1 = #{extend1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, extend2 = #{extend2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, extend3 = #{extend3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, extend4 = #{extend4,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, updated = now()
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT} and is_delete = 0

update client_template
is_delete = 1, updated = now(), update_id = #{operatorId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT} and is_delete = 0
